title: Fix: Send in-app notifications to all faculty when Student Coordinator registers

requirements.summary: Display pending Student Coordinator approval notifications in faculty NotificationsDashboard with Approve/Reject actions
acceptanceCriteria: Faculty Notifications tab shows a card for each pending coordinator with the coordinator's display name and email visible.
Each card has an Approve button and a Reject button; clicking either calls the appropriate backend mutation.
After one faculty member approves or rejects, the coordinator's verification status in their profile is updated accordingly.
After approval or rejection, the notification is cleared from all faculty accounts' notification lists (backend removes or marks it resolved for all faculty principals).
The Student Coordinator's profile Verification Status badge updates to Approved or Rejected upon the next fetch after faculty action.

file_operations.description: Update NotificationsDashboard to render coordinator verification request notifications for faculty users. Parse the notification content to extract coordinator name, email, and principal. Display each coordinator request in a dedicated card with the coordinator's name and email prominently shown. Include Approve and Reject action buttons that call useApproveVerificationRequest and useRejectVerification mutations respectively. After a faculty member acts on a request, the mutation should trigger query invalidation for pending requests and notifications, clearing the notification from all faculty accounts. Ensure the UI shows loading states during approval/rejection and displays success feedback.

Update the mutation's onSuccess handler to explicitly call resolveCoordinatorVerificationNotifications after approving a verification request. This ensures the backend clears the pending-approval notification from all faculty accounts. Pass the coordinator's principal to the backend method. Invalidate both 'pendingVerificationRequests' and 'notifications' query keys to refresh the faculty UI immediately after approval.

Update the mutation's onSuccess handler to explicitly call resolveCoordinatorVerificationNotifications after rejecting a verification request. This ensures the backend clears the pending-approval notification from all faculty accounts. Pass the coordinator's principal to the backend method. Invalidate both 'pendingVerificationRequests' and 'notifications' query keys to refresh the faculty UI immediately after rejection.
